data.text: MEDIUM SIZED, FELISIAN, BREATHABLE ATMOSPHERE. OF COURSE I'D FIND
ANOTHER ONE. IT'S LIKE ROSE PETALS STREWN ACROSS THE GALAXY. AT
354.60 IT'S MOSTLY SCRUBBY PLANTS AND GRASSES. AT 3337.49 THERE'S A
COUPLE OF LAKES AND YOU CAN SEE LOTS OF BIRDS. AT 341.91 EVEN THOUGH
IT'S NOT MY NATURE TO GLORIFY MYSELF (WHO AM I KIDDING?) YOU CAN SEE
SKINNYMON'S TREE. YES, I TOO GET A BIG TREE. BUT THIS ONE'S NOT IN
A DENSE FOREST, BUT A BARELY FORESTED AREA. THE TREE IS ACTUALLY
LOCATED AT 341.91:7.-1 BUT YOU CAN SEE IT UPON LANDING IS YOU LOOK
SOUTH BY SLIGHTLY EAST. BY THE WAY, THERE'S ALSO HOPPERS THERE.
